jsonLd.title: Delhivery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
